picks.match: Parramatta Eels vs Manly Warringah Sea Eagles
picks.reasoning: Manly at 1.33 sits below my preferred range, but the gap in implied probability here is too significant to ignore — the Sea Eagles are heavy favourites against a Parramatta side showing no meaningful signals of an upset. The news cycle references NRLW tries stats for Parramatta, not current first-grade form momentum, which tells its own story. When the market prices a team this confidently and the evidence doesn't contradict it, discipline means taking the sure thing over chasing range.

Knights at home at 2.10 is the sweet spot right there — good value for a home side that should have the crowd behind them. Dolphins are decent but backing the home team at over 2s in NRL is usually where the money's at. Gut says Knights get up in this one.

Portugal at 4.3 in a World Cup knockout clash against Spain? We're talking about Cristiano's nation on home continent soil, a squad that's been quietly terrifying all tournament, and Spain who always find a way to bottle it when it matters most. Iberian derbies are NEVER one-sided — Portugal have the firepower and the hunger to pull the ultimate upset here, and I'm riding that wave all the way to the bank!
